PermissionSet.description: Grants visibility of the Pro Forma Timeline fullscreen tabs. Delivery_Gantt_Standalone is the FlexiPage-backed route (keeps SF chrome). Delivery_Gantt_Full_Bleed is the Visualforce + Lightning Out route (no SF chrome). Both assigned together by default — admins can remove one if they want to hide the other.
PermissionSet.label: Delivery Hub — Gantt Fullscreen
